Description: The faux commander yearns for a tale of undying vengeance, and as you revisit your numerous memories of such, you recall the auspice Seiryu and his single-minded desire to destroy his loathed foe. Your mind's eye brings that furious encounter to vivid life, and you find yourself facing the mighty being once more in a bid to quell his aramitama ere it consumes him...

Beneath the Ninth's roiling sky lies the Mist Continent, once home to the Kingdom of Alexandria and her fellow nations. The nearest of these, according to Sphene, was the city-state of Treno. It is toward that potential bastion of civilization that you and your companions now forge a path through the storm...
